data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of rescheduling a single instance, but the linked use case does not provide sufficient evidence to confirm this functionality. The use case mentions the ability to move one cleaning to Thursday for that week only, which does not explicitly cover the requirement of rescheduling a single instance in a broader context. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not support the expected result of confirming the requirement or capturing a precise gap.
gaps: The linked use case does not explicitly confirm the ability to reschedule a single instance as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
